# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

```yaml
Resources:
    MyEC2Instance1: # name of instance resource as 'My EC2 Instance...'. Replace with your specific needs, like "YourInstancename" etc.)
        Type: AWS::EC2::Instance 
        Properties:  
            ImageId: ami-0abcdefghijklmnopqrstuv    # replace this image id by the one appropriate to use in EC2 instances. The name of AMI should match with your needs, example : "ubuntu/images/hvm-ssd/us-east-1/2016.09.18/x86_64/gp2"
            InstanceType: t2.micro     # You may need to adjust this as per the requirement – For example, 't2.nano' or higher depending on your needs (Replace with appropriate instance type)  
             ...    : "..."        [fill other properties]                  .....                      ././..../.........# More details about AWS EC2 Properties in official documentation https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-ec2-instance.html
